word: H4420 - מְלֵחָה - mᵉlêchâh - mel-ay-khaw' - Barren land

sections.paragraph:
Original: מלחה

Transliteration: melêchâh

Phonetic: mel-ay-khaw'

BDB Definition:

  1. saltness, barrenness, saltiness

Origin: from H4414 (in its denominative sense)

TWOT entry: 1197b

Part(s) of speech: Noun Feminine
